description: AI-powered, broker-free real estate platform for India

tasks.task: Design full system architecture: monorepo structure, tech stack selection (Next.js frontend, Node.js/Express or NestJS API, PostgreSQL, Redis, S3-compatible storage), third-party integrations (Aadhaar DigiLocker API, RERA validation, AI virtual tour API, GenAI floor plan), and deployment topology (AWS Mumbai region).

Design and write the Prisma schema for all entities: User (with Aadhaar verification status), Property (with type, transaction type, RERA fields, status), PropertyPhoto, VirtualTour, FloorPlanRequest, ChatThread, ChatMessage, SavedProperty, Report.

Implement authentication API endpoints: POST /auth/request-otp (phone), POST /auth/verify-otp (phone OTP login/register), POST /auth/aadhaar/initiate (start DigiLocker Aadhaar KYC), POST /auth/aadhaar/callback (handle KYC result and update user verified status), GET /auth/me.

Implement property listing CRUD API endpoints: POST /properties (create listing with RERA format validation), GET /properties (search with filters: city, type, bhk, price range, verified, listing type), GET /properties/:id (detail), PUT /properties/:id, PATCH /properties/:id/status (sold/rented/active), DELETE /properties/:id. All write endpoints require Aadhaar-verified user.

Implement photo upload API: POST /properties/:id/photos (accept multipart/form-data, validate max 20 files, compress with sharp, upload to S3, store URLs in DB), DELETE /properties/:id/photos/:photoId.

Implement AI Virtual Tour service: POST /properties/:id/virtual-tour/generate — accept property photos from S3, send to third-party AI tour API (Matterport/Kuula or open-source NeRF pipeline), poll for completion, store tour embed URL in VirtualTour table, update status (PENDING → PROCESSING → READY → FAILED). GET /properties/:id/virtual-tour — return embed URL and status.

Implement AI Floor Plan Generator service: POST /properties/:id/floor-plan — accept plot dimensions (length, width in feet), floors, room preferences; construct structured prompt and call GPT-4o (or architecture-specific model) to generate a 2D floor plan image; store result PNG/SVG in S3; save FloorPlanRequest record with download URL. Limit 3 generations per (buyer, property) per day.

Implement direct chat API: POST /chat/threads (initiate thread between buyer and owner for a property — requires verified buyer), GET /chat/threads (list all threads for authenticated user), GET /chat/threads/:threadId/messages (paginated message history), POST /chat/threads/:threadId/messages (send message), PATCH /chat/threads/:threadId/share-phone (owner opts to share phone number in thread), POST /chat/threads/:threadId/report.

Implement real-time chat using WebSockets (Socket.io or native WS): authenticated socket connection, join/leave thread rooms, broadcast new messages to thread participants, emit unread-count updates. Persist all messages to DB via the chat API.

Implement saved properties (shortlist) API: POST /saved-properties (save a listing), GET /saved-properties (list saved properties for authenticated buyer), DELETE /saved-properties/:propertyId. Implement reporting API: POST /reports (report a listing or user with reason).

Implement notifications service: send email (via SendGrid/AWS SES) when a new chat message arrives for an owner or buyer. Create email templates for: new message received, Aadhaar verification success, listing published, listing deactivated pending review (fraud flag).

Set up Next.js 14 (App Router) project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui component library, React Query for data fetching, Zustand for global state, and Axios HTTP client. Configure environment variables, API base URL, and auth token storage (HttpOnly cookie preferred).

Build authentication pages and flows: /login (phone + OTP input), /verify-aadhaar (Aadhaar OTP step), /profile (user profile with verification status badge). Implement auth guard HOC to protect routes that require verified status.

Build homepage with search bar (city, type: buy/rent) and hero section. Build /search page with full filter panel (BHK, price slider, property type, verified toggle, furnishing), results grid with property cards (photo, price, BHK, locality, badges), and pagination.

Build property detail page /properties/:id: photo gallery (lightbox), all specs, RERA badge, owner verified badge, AI virtual tour embed (iframe), AI floor plan section (for plots: input form + generated plan display + download button), 'Chat with Owner' CTA button, Save button.

Build owner dashboard /dashboard: listing management table (status, views, inquiry count, edit/deactivate/delete actions), 'Create Listing' button, virtual tour status indicator per listing. Build create/edit listing multi-step form: basic details → photos upload (drag-and-drop) → RERA & verification → preview → publish.

Build in-app chat UI /messages: thread list sidebar (with unread badge, last message preview), chat window (message bubbles, timestamps, share phone button for owner, report button). Integrate Socket.io client for real-time message delivery and unread count updates.

Build saved properties page /saved: grid of shortlisted property cards with remove button. Implement toast notifications (new chat message, listing status changes). Ensure fully responsive layout (mobile-first) for all pages.

Write Docker Compose configuration for local development: services for PostgreSQL, Redis, API server, Next.js dev server, and MinIO (S3-compatible local storage). Write Dockerfile for API and Dockerfile for web. Set up environment variable management (.env.example).

Write GitHub Actions CI pipeline: on PR to main — run lint (ESLint + Prettier), unit tests (Jest), build check for both API and web. On merge to main — build and push Docker images to ECR, run Prisma migrations on RDS, deploy API to ECS (Fargate) and web to Vercel or ECS. Configure AWS Mumbai region (ap-south-1).

Write integration tests for all critical API endpoints: auth OTP flow, property CRUD, photo upload, chat message send/receive, floor plan generation request. Write Playwright E2E tests for: user registration → Aadhaar verify → create listing → buyer search → view property → initiate chat flow.
